Hoolheyak:Bibliotheca.NAME: Bibliotheca
Hoolheyak:Bibliotheca.FLAVOR: Memory is like a library, though clearly, each library has a different amount of books.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of combat, gain #b2 Analysis.

Hoolheyak:FrenziedSundial.NAME: Frenzied Sundial
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of each turn, gain [E] and enter a random #y Aspect.

Hoolheyak:StarMapProjection.NAME: Star Map Projection
Hoolheyak:StarMapProjection.FLAVOR: Many people first approach astrology out of curiosity about their own death.
DESCRIPTIONS: Most #yVariables can spend extra [E] to trigger all effects simultaneously.

Hoolheyak:OldNotes.NAME: Old Notes
Hoolheyak:OldNotes.FLAVOR: They contain a lot of valuable literature. As for how they were collected…
DESCRIPTIONS: For every #b5 Attack cards drawn, gain #b1 Erudition; for every #b5 Skill cards drawn, gain #b1 Meander.

Hoolheyak:TimeMuseum.NAME: Time Gallery of K'uk'ulkan
Hoolheyak:TimeMuseum.FLAVOR: The Fool builds high walls, the Philosopher knocks them down, and vice versa… History is an interesting library, surely containing insights for the future, since history was once the future of countless generations.
DESCRIPTIONS: In each combat, the first time you play each card type, play it an additional #b1 time.

Hoolheyak:CocktailShaker.NAME: Cocktail Shaker
DESCRIPTIONS: Upon pickup, Max HP + #b3. For every #b1 other-colored cards played, heal #b1 HP.

Hoolheyak:TailCareKit.NAME: Tail Care Kit
Hoolheyak:TailCareKit.FLAVOR: "Are you a thick-tail or a thin-tail person?"
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of combat, apply #b7 Deconstruction to all enemies.

Hoolheyak:BeautifulHistoryBook.NAME: Beautifully Bound History Book
Hoolheyak:BeautifulHistoryBook.FLAVOR: The same technique is ineffective on a clever person.
DESCRIPTIONS: Enemies defeated in this run start combat with #b50% Max HP lost. NL (Right-click to view the list.)

Hoolheyak:AstronomicalTelescope.NAME: Astronomical Telescope
Hoolheyak:AstronomicalTelescope.FLAVOR: Those constellations, planets, and trajectories are not commands but metaphors.
DESCRIPTIONS: Upon pickup, transform #b1 random Attack or Skill card in your deck into a colorless card. If none exist, gain #b1 random #yRare colorless card.

Hoolheyak:BottledCloud.NAME: Bottled Cloud
Hoolheyak:BottledCloud.FLAVOR: "Great, now I can double jump better."
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you gain #yAgility, gain an additional #b1 #yAgility.

Hoolheyak:WeatherBalloon.NAME: Weather Balloon
DESCRIPTIONS: When an enemy triggers #yLevitate, they gain an additional #b5 Lift.

Hoolheyak:ZodiacModel.NAME: Zodiac Model
Hoolheyak:ZodiacModel.FLAVOR: Feathers are moistened by the forest dew, tails sweep over crumbling pillars, and knowledge continues generation after generation.
DESCRIPTIONS: When an enemy’s intent differs from the previous turn, apply #b2 Lift to them.

Hoolheyak:StarryRevelation.NAME: Galleria Stellaria's Splendor
Hoolheyak:StarryRevelation.FLAVOR: The sky of Tremon has been restored, but surely no one can forget the sight of it being torn apart.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of elite or boss fights, apply Lift equal to half their #yGravity to all enemies.

Hoolheyak:PureWaterSpriteAssist.NAME: Pure Water Elf Assistance
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of combat, summon #b1 Shapeshifter with #b16 HP. While alive, enemies are forced to attack it. It respawns at full HP #b3 turns after death.
